list.name: machine_id
list.query: SELECT device_id AS __text FROM public.devices WHERE enabled = true ORDER BY device_id ASC;
list.label: Machine

list.name: interface
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT iface_name AS __text FROM public.net_metrics;
list.label: Interface

options.content: APEX COMMANDNOC OVERVIEW  |  ENG DRILL-DOWN  |  CAPACITY FORECAST

panels.description: OS Taskbar navigation and CSS theme.

panels.title: ALERTS & ACTIVE INCIDENTS
panels.description: Currently firing alerts from Grafana unified alerting.

panels.title: Fleet Health Score
panels.description: Composite fleet health score (0-100%) from v_fleet_health view.

panels.title: LDI Yield Risk (% Outside Tolerance)

targets.rawSql:
WITH ldi AS (
  SELECT device_id, pressure, joule_effect
  FROM public.ldi_metrics
  WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND pressure IS NOT NULL
    AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
)
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(pressure) > 10 OR ABS(joule_effect) > 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value
FROM ldi

panels.description: Percentage of LDI readings exceeding ±10µm tolerance in the last hour. Green <5%, Yellow <15%, Red ≥15%.

panels.title: Power Cost Estimation (THB/day)

targets.rawSql: WITH power_data AS (SELECT device_id, AVG(power_watt) AS avg_watts FROM public.ldi_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' AND power_watt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY device_id) SELECT 'Fleet Power Cost' AS metric, ROUND(SUM(avg_watts * 24 * 4.5 / 1000)::NUMERIC, 0) AS value FROM power_data

panels.description: Estimated daily power cost in Thai Baht based on average LDI power consumption × 24 hours × 4.5 THB/kWh.

panels.title: TOP 10 CRITICAL NODES

targets.rawSql: SELECT device_id AS "Server Name", CASE WHEN MAX(time) > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' THEN 'online' WHEN MAX(time) > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' THEN 'stale' ELSE 'offline' END AS "Status", ROUND(AVG(cpu_load_percent)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "CPU (%)", ROUND(AVG(temp_c)::NUMERIC, 0) AS "Temp (°C)", COUNT(*)::TEXT AS "Samples (10m)" FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY device_id ORDER BY "CPU (%)" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description: Real-time fleet status table showing each machine's CPU, RAM, disk, temperature, network, and LDI health. Click machine name to drill down.

panels.title: CPU Load (Fleet Envelope)

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(AVG(avg_cpu)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT time, ROUND(AVG(cpu_load_percent)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND time > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(bucket) FROM public.sys_hourly), NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') GROUP BY time ORDER BY 1

SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(MAX(avg_cpu)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT time, ROUND(MAX(cpu_load_percent)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND time > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(bucket) FROM public.sys_hourly), NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') GROUP BY time ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Fleet-wide cpu load envelope: average (solid cyan) vs worst-case ceiling (dashed #EF444D).

panels.title: Temperature (Fleet Envelope)

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(AVG(max_temp)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND max_temp > 0 GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT time, ROUND(AVG(temp_c)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND time > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(bucket) FROM public.sys_hourly), NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AND temp_c > 0 GROUP BY time ORDER BY 1

SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(MAX(max_temp)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND max_temp > 0 GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT time, ROUND(MAX(temp_c)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND time > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(bucket) FROM public.sys_hourly), NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AND temp_c > 0 GROUP BY time ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Fleet-wide temperature envelope: average (solid cyan) vs worst-case ceiling (dashed #EF444D).

panels.title: Network Throughput (All Machines)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  bucket AS time,
  device_id AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_rx)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "RX (Mbps)"
FROM public.net_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT
  bucket AS time,
  device_id AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_tx)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "TX (Mbps)"
FROM public.net_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC

panels.description: Network throughput (Mbps) for all machines. Download (positive) and Upload (negative-Y axis) per interface.

panels.title: RAM Saturation (Fleet Envelope)

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(AVG(avg_ram_used / NULLIF(avg_ram_total, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT time, ROUND(AVG(ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND time > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(bucket) FROM public.sys_hourly), NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') GROUP BY time ORDER BY 1

SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND(MAX(avg_ram_used / NULLIF(avg_ram_total, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT time, ROUND(MAX(ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC,1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND time > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(bucket) FROM public.sys_hourly), NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') GROUP BY time ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Fleet-wide ram saturation envelope: average (solid cyan) vs worst-case ceiling (dashed #EF444D).
